title: vicia faba subsp. minor
intro: Vicia faba subsp. minor, also known as the small broad bean or wild fava bean, is a subspecies of the broad bean plant that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Vicia faba subsp. minor include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
